name: Development Pod
description: Foundational delivery composition for planning, test-first implementation, challenge, and verification.

members.responsibility: Decompose work and prepare delivery handoffs.
Write the failing test contract first.
Challenge the implementation and tests for gaps and gaming.
Verify the implementation against the contract.

workflow: Planner tech lead defines plan and acceptance shape.
TDD test writer produces failing behavioral contract.
Optional IaC coder handles infrastructure scope when needed.
Adversarial test writer probes for weak or gamed tests.
Test verifier emits the final implementation verification state.
handoff_rules: Planning hands off to TDD before implementation begins.
Implementation hands off to reviewers before the pod is considered complete.
rework_routing: Verification failure routes back to executor personas through the pod.
done_criteria: Pod output is ready for team-level review panels
